message.content:
{
  "page_type": "wiring_diagram",
  "summary": "This page contains a wiring diagram for an HVAC control system, specifically showing connections to a mainboard, along with a list of symbol definitions for various temperature sensors, pressure switches, and current measurements. The diagram includes components like compressors, fans, and sensors, with labeled terminals and connections.",
  "visual_entities": [
    {"type": "component", "label": "mainboard"},
    {"type": "component", "label": "compressor"},
    {"type": "component", "label": "fan"},
    {"type": "sensor", "label": "temperature sensor"},
    {"type": "switch", "label": "pressure switch"},
    {"type": "terminal", "label": "terminal block"},
    {"type": "wire", "label": "connection wire"}
  ],
  "visual_relationships": [
    {"from": "temperature sensor", "relation": "connected to", "to": "mainboard"},
    {"from": "pressure switch", "relation": "connected to", "to": "mainboard"},
    {"from": "compressor", "relation": "connected to", "to": "mainboard"},
    {"from": "fan", "relation": "connected to", "to": "mainboard"},
    {"from": "terminal block", "relation": "connected to", "to": "mainboard"}
  ],
  "useful_for_knowledge_types": ["wiring connections", "component identification", "control system layout", "sensor integration"],
  "ocr_text_if_useful": "第七部分：控制原理相关符号定义\n一、符号定义\n1. 出水温度——T_o;\n2. 回水温度——T_r;\n3. 室外环境温度——T_e;\n4. A系统压缩机1排气温度——T_a1;\n5. A系统压缩机2排气温度——T_a2;\n6. B系统压缩机1排气温度——T_b1;\n7. B系统压缩机2排气温度——T_b2;\n8. A系统盘管入口温度——T_a3;\n9. B系统盘管入口温度——T_b3;\n10. A系统盘管出口温度——T_a4;\n11. B系统盘管出口温度——T_b4;\n12. A系统水换冷媒入口温度——T_a5;\n13. B系统水换冷媒入口温度——T_b5;\n14. A系统水换冷媒出口温度——T_a6;\n15. B系统水换冷媒出口温度——T_b6;\n16. A系统吸气温度——T_a7;\n17. B系统吸气温度——T_b7;\n18. A系统高压保护开关信号——HP1;\n19. A系统低压保护开关信号——LP1;\n20. B系统高压保护开关信号——HP2;\n21. B系统低压保护开关信号——LP2;\n22. A系统压缩机1三相交流输入电流(三相中采一相) ——IAC1;",
  "uncertainty_notes": "The wiring diagram is complex with many connections; some specific terminal labels or wire colors are not clearly legible. The exact spatial layout of components beyond the mainboard is inferred from typical HVAC diagrams.",
  "confidence": 0.85
}

The diagram includes components like compressors, fans, and sensors, with labeled terminals and connections.
